heading: Entrance or admission fees prohibited
label: 410www–4 Entrance or admission fees prohibited
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no fees shall be charged for entrance or admission to the national historical park or the preservation district established by this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 460bbbb–4 of this title
Amendments2018— substituted “national historical park” for “national historic site”.Pub. L. 115–108
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “national historical park” for “national historic site”.Pub. L. 115–108
